intro: Deppea flava, also known as yellow Deppea, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, and protecting against cell damage.
